title: verbascum × subalpinum
intro: Verbascum × subalpinum, also known as the subalpine mullein, is a hybrid plant species of the Verbascum genus, commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain saponins, flavonoids, and iridoid glycosides, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × subalpinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
